page.heading: Skills
page.subtitle: Reusable review rules attached to agents and injected into their prompt.

empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: Create a skill from scratch or import one from a Markdown file.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview its body.

create.title: Create skill
create.subtitle: A skill is a reusable review rule injected into an agent's prompt.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionCaption: Write this as a directive — an instruction to the agent (e.g. "Flag any PR that…"). It appears in the prompt assembly.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Flag any PR that introduces a security vulnerability
fields.bodyPlaceholder:
# Rule

Describe the rule in detail…

import.title: Import skill
import.subtitle: Import a skill from a .md or .zip file. You will see a preview before saving.
import.fileHint: Only the Markdown body is extracted from .zip files — scripts and executables are dropped.
import.trustWarning: ⚠ Trust warning: an imported skill is someone else's instructions injected directly into your agent's prompt. Review the body carefully before saving.

config.title: Configuration
config.name: Name
config.descriptionCaption: Write this as a directive — an instruction to the agent (e.g. "Flag any PR that…"). It appears in the prompt assembly.
config.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version snapshot.

preview.title: Preview
preview.caption: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.

stats.title: Stats
stats.demoNote: Note: pull rate, accept rate and findings count are seeded demo numbers for L02.

versions.title: Version history
versions.caption: Every save snapshots the body so eval runs stay reproducible against the exact text they scored.
